# llms.txt — bitcoin101.site
# AI / LLM usage policy (human-readable).

Site: https://bitcoin101.site/
Owner: Breno Brito

Allowed:
- Indexing, citation, and short excerpts for search and question answering.
- Summaries and paraphrases.
- Linking back to the original URL.

Not allowed:
- Republishing full pages verbatim as a substitute for the original.
- Presenting content as financial/investment advice.

Attribution:
- Please cite the canonical URL of the referenced page.

Notes:
- Content is educational and informational.
- Bitcoin is a high-risk asset; this site does not provide investment recommendations.
